programs.name: Lower Body Power + Left Side Rebuild
programs.description: 12-week program for Tom focused on leg press power to 250 lbs and rebuilding left-side upper body pressing after right shoulder restriction. Right shoulder: no loading. Left side: progressively built from surgeon-cleared December 2025.

program_json.summary: A 12-week program for Tom that channels his ex-tennis player athleticism into lower body power (targeting 250 lb leg press) while carefully rebuilding left-side upper body pressing after orthopedic clearance in December 2025. Right shoulder remains unloaded per surgical guidance throughout the block.

weeks.theme: Lower Body Foundation — leg press and split squat baseline

sessions.label: Week 1 Day A
sessions.focus: Assessment — shoulder restrictions and lower body baseline

sessions.label: Week 1 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body strength + cable pulling right side

weeks.theme: Lower Body Progression — first load increases

sessions.label: Week 2 Day A
sessions.focus: Progressive lower body + introduce medicine ball work

sessions.label: Week 2 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body hypertrophy + core circuit

weeks.theme: Lower Body Volume — add medicine ball and single-leg work

sessions.label: Week 3 Day A
sessions.focus: Lower body strength peak + single-arm cable intro

sessions.label: Week 3 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body + introduce left-side push (surgeon-cleared)

sessions.label: Week 4 Day A
sessions.focus: End-of-year strength assessment — push lower body ceiling

sessions.label: Week 4 Day B
sessions.focus: New year leg power focus + upper body volume

weeks.theme: Lower Body Strength Peak — introduce single-arm cable

sessions.label: Week 5 Day A
sessions.focus: Lower body and left-upper volume — all loads pushed

sessions.label: Week 5 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body power peak + left-side upper body push

weeks.theme: Left-Side Upper Intro — surgeon clearance applied

sessions.label: Week 6 Day A
sessions.focus: Leg press 235 lbs + left-side DB press 35 lbs

sessions.label: Week 6 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body power + single-arm cable bilateral work

weeks.theme: End-of-Year Strength Assessment — push load ceilings

sessions.label: Week 7 Day A
sessions.focus: Lower body strength consolidation — 220 lbs

sessions.label: Week 7 Day B
sessions.focus: Left-side upper volume — DB press 35 lbs × 3 sets

weeks.theme: New Year — leg power focus + upper body volume

sessions.label: Week 8 Day A
sessions.focus: Leg press 230 lbs + upper body pull emphasis

sessions.label: Week 8 Day B
sessions.focus: Full lower body circuit + left-side push superset

weeks.theme: Lower Body + Left-Upper Volume — all loads pushed

sessions.label: Week 9 Day A
sessions.focus: Lower body power + left-side upper push — both arms

sessions.label: Week 9 Day B
sessions.focus: Leg press 240 lbs + left-side DB press 37.5 lbs

weeks.theme: Lower Body Power Peak + Left-Side Upper Push

sessions.label: Week 10 Day B

sessions.focus: Leg press 250 lbs milestone attempt

sessions.label: Week 11 Day B
sessions.focus: Left-side DB press 40 lbs attempt

weeks.theme: Block Complete — 250 lbs leg press and assessment

sessions.label: Week 12 Day A
sessions.focus: Block assessment — bilateral pressing introduction plan
